name: Recommend by Genre and Popularity
query:
PROFILE

MATCH (u:User)-[:LISTENED]->(listenedSong:Song)
WITH DISTINCT u, listenedSong.genre AS userGenre
LIMIT 20
MATCH (recommendationSongs:Song)
WHERE recommendationSongs.genre = userGenre
  AND recommendationSongs.popularity > 70
  AND NOT (u)-[:LISTENED]->(recommendationSongs)
WITH u, collect(DISTINCT recommendationSongs)[0..10] AS topRecommendationSongs
UNWIND topRecommendationSongs AS finalSongs
MERGE (finalSongs)-[:RECOMMENDATION_TO]->(u)

name: Recommended by Favorite Artists and songs Popularity
query:
PROFILE

MATCH (u:User)-[:LISTENED]->(listenedSong:Song)
WITH DISTINCT u, listenedSong.artists AS userFavoriteArtists
MATCH (recommendationSongs:Song)
WHERE recommendationSongs.artists = userFavoriteArtists
  AND recommendationSongs.popularity > 70
  AND NOT (u)-[:LISTENED]->(recommendationSongs)
WITH u, collect(DISTINCT recommendationSongs)[0..10] AS topRecommendationSongs
UNWIND topRecommendationSongs AS finalSongs
MERGE (finalSongs)-[:RECOMMENDATION_TO]->(u)

name: Song recommendation based on favorite artists and popularity, filtering explicits songs
query:
PROFILE

MATCH (u:User)-[:LISTENED]->(listenedSong:Song)
WITH DISTINCT u, listenedSong.artists AS userFavoriteArtists
MATCH (recommendationSongs:Song)
WHERE recommendationSongs.artists = userFavoriteArtists
  AND recommendationSongs.popularity > 50
  AND recommendationSongs.explicit <> TRUE
  AND NOT (u)-[:LISTENED]->(recommendationSongs)
WITH u, collect(DISTINCT recommendationSongs)[0..10] AS topRecommendationSongs
UNWIND topRecommendationSongs AS finalSongs
MERGE (finalSongs)-[relCreated:RECOMMENDATION_TO]->(u)
RETURN finalSongs, relCreated

name: Song recommendation by favorite artists album, popularity and without explicity.
query:
PROFILE

MATCH (u:User)-[:LISTENED]->(listenedSong:Song)
WITH DISTINCT u, listenedSong.album AS userFavoriteArtistsAlbum
MATCH (recommendationSongs:Song)
WHERE recommendationSongs.album = userFavoriteArtistsAlbum
  AND recommendationSongs.popularity > 50
  AND recommendationSongs.explicit <> TRUE
  AND NOT (u)-[:LISTENED]->(recommendationSongs)
WITH u, collect(DISTINCT recommendationSongs)[0..2] AS topRecommendationSongs
UNWIND topRecommendationSongs AS finalSongs
MERGE (finalSongs)-[relCreated:RECOMMENDATION_TO]->(u)
RETURN finalSongs, relCreated
